title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Gradeup - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Gradeup - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
